updates.title: Claude Code v2.1.183 — Improved Auto Mode Safety, Deprecation Warnings & Bug Fixes
updates.summary: Anthropic released Claude Code v2.1.183 on June 19, 2026, introducing critical safety guardrails for auto mode: destructive git commands (git reset --hard, git checkout -- ., git clean -fd, git stash drop) are now blocked unless explicitly requested, git commit --amend is blocked when the commit was not made by the agent in the current session, and terraform/pulumi/cdk destroy commands require explicit confirmation before running. The update also adds model deprecation warnings in print (-p) mode and for models set in agent frontmatter, a new attribution.sessionUrl setting to omit claude.ai session links from commits/PRs, and a /config --help command listing all shorthand keys. Numerous bugs were fixed spanning JetBrains IDE flickering, subagent spawning errors, WebSearch empty results in subagents, TUI corruption under heavy load, tmux pane launch failures, and background task lifecycle issues.
updates.accuracy_notes: Sourced directly from the official Anthropic Claude Code changelog at code.claude.com/docs/en/changelog — a first-party Anthropic property. All details are verifiable product release notes. No red flags or unverified claims. Cross-confirmed via GitHub releases and Releasebot aggregator.

slides: Claude Code v2.1.183: The Safety Update AI Developers Needed
BLOCKED: git reset --hard, git clean -fd, git checkout -- . (unless you asked for it)
BLOCKED: git commit --amend on any commit the agent didn't make this session
BLOCKED: terraform destroy / pulumi destroy / cdk destroy without your explicit go-ahead
PLUS: Model deprecation warnings, /config --help, 10+ critical bug fixes

twitter_x.thread_opener: Claude Code v2.1.183 just shipped and it quietly fixes one of the biggest risks of autonomous AI coding: agents accidentally destroying your git history or nuking your infrastructure. Here's the full breakdown 🧵

youtube_tiktok.hook: Anthropic just stopped Claude Code from being able to accidentally delete your entire git history — and this is a massive deal for developers using AI agents

ebook_blog.title: Safety Rails for AI Coding Agents: How Claude Code v2.1.183 Sets a New Standard for Autonomous Development
